channel.title: Shift Lead on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working at Taco Bell as a Shift Lead: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: Everything you need to know about being a Taco Bell shift lead, including pay, daily responsibilities, pros, cons, and practical advice from real employees.
